name: omarchy_ai
content:
AI 
Omarchy ships with OpenCode as the defaut agent harness for programmers. It's a great
way to use modes from a the major commercia providers as we as the rapidy
improving open-weight modes. The best way to use OpenCode is by going to the
directory you're going to work on in the termina, then invoke the c  aias to start
OpenCode within that directory.
Dictation 
Omarchy offers AI dictation via Voxtype. You insta it via Insta > AI  Dictation through
the Omarchy menu. By defaut, it' oad a base Engish mode that takes up 150MB. But
you can tweak which mode you'd ike to use by running voxtype setup model in the
termina. And you can tweak a the settings via ~/.config/voxtype/config.toml.
Once you're instaed, you dictate by hoding down Super + Ctrl + X, and once you
reease, the dictated text wi appear in the focused input area.
The Omarchy Ski 
Agent skis hep AI use specific toos in a specific way, and Omarchy ships with a defaut
ski for taioring the system. Like making changes to waybar or even creating a new theme
from scratch. It's automaticay configured in OpenCode (and Caude Code and any other
harness that supports ~/.claude/skills).
But you shoud treat this ski as experimenta. Different modes wi use it to different
effect. It's best to run in pan mode first, so you have an idea of what the agent woud ike
to change. And then be ready to roback changes or even invoking omarchy-reinstall-
configs, if the agent makes a mess of everything.
Loca LLMs 
Omarchy recommends two ways of running oca LLM modes: LM Studio and Oama. LM
Studio provides a GUI interface for finding open-weight modes, instaing them, and
running them. It's a great way to get going easiy. Oama offers a CLI for doing so
simiary. But if you're new to oca modes, I'd start with LM Studio. You can insta either
under Insta > AI in the Omarchy Menu.
Other agent harnesses 
If you don't want to use OpenCode as a muti-mode harness, you can aso insta the
provider-specific harnesses from Insta > AI. You' find Caude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenAI
Codex, GitHub Copiot here.
You aso have access to Crush, which is an aternative to OpenCode by the exceent crew
at Charm (who makes the gum  TUI too that much of Omarchy is buit with).
AI · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/107/ai
